name: organized-workshop
description: Plugin marketplace for Organized Workshop / Organized AI tooling. Starts with the bootstrap + QA gate + Loop Engineering skills; promote to a standalone Organized-AI/claude-plugins marketplace once more plugins exist.

plugins.name: organized-bootstrap-qa
plugins.description: Applies the Organized Codebase template, runs the phase-gated bootstrap QA loop, and provides the spec/build/review Loop Engineering skills.
